title: rosa viscaria var. arvatica
intro: Rosa viscaria var. arvatica, also known as the alpine rose, is a variety of the viscaria rose that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. arvatica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Voprosy pitaniia", rosa viscaria var. arvatica benefits from its high antioxidant activity, particularly due to its high content of total phenols, total flavonoids, and its ability to inhibit the oxidation of linoleic acid.
